## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the relevant issue above.
- [ ] I ran the relevant local validation and recorded it above.
- [ ] If this PR fixes a bug, I added or updated a regression fixture or test.
- [ ] If this PR adds a parity fixture, I updated `fixtures/parity/fixture-registry.ts`.
- [ ] I updated docs when the contributor workflow or shipped behavior changed.
